name: Parker-Hannifin Corporation
description: Parker-Hannifin Corporation is a global leader in motion and control technologies, providing precision-engineered solutions for a wide variety of mobile, industrial, and aerospace markets. The company's expertise spans core motion technologies including fluid connectors, hydraulics, pneumatics, electromechanical systems, filtration, and climate control. With a history dating back to 1917, Parker-Hannifin operates through two main segments: Diversified Industrial and Aerospace Systems. Its products are vital to virtually everything that moves, supporting infrastructure, transportation, and manufacturing sectors worldwide with highly engineered components and systems.
